feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: This is a love story - no, this is a detective story
entry.summary:
Author: extraterrestrialcat

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,665Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Clark and Bruce have a little something going on until Clark tears it apart, along with Bruce's heart. They attempt a new trial run for their relationship, and embrace after long periods of prolonged silence with passionate, fiery love. A bit of angst at the start, after all, you can't expect their relationship to be completely perfect. I absolutely hate angst so it will not have hefty amounts, I can assure you that.

entry.title: New Way Home
entry.summary:
Author: no_stranger

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,799Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 185

Summary: Peter loses Tony Stark? Check. Peter loses Aunt May? Check. Peter has to leave behind his universe, thus losing the last three people that really mattered to him? Check. Surely things can only go up from here.

entry.title: Superbat
entry.summary:
Author: DiamondBat

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 140,171Chapters: 37/?Kudos: 2,344

Summary: The things Batman does for his Superman.Bruce will go to great lengths to impress, protect, and look after the one who matters the most to him.(The first few chapters start off as crack mixed in with fluff and romance, and then the story becomes more serious as the chapters progress.)

entry.title: A Little Sunshine
entry.summary:
Author: LuminescentWoollyBear

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,610Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 30

Summary: An alien appears in Metropolis and Bruce doesn't know what to do about it. Even more concerning, Bruce breaks his promise to himself to avoid unnecessary attachments and starts developing feelings for his new friend, Clark. But he just can't help gravitating towards the earnest kindness and protective warmth of the other. If he isn't careful, Bruce might even start trusting him. ~~~ I'm not really a fan of tagging non-main ships, but this fic does contain some others to various degrees, including: Bruce/Other, Bruce/Selina Kyle

entry.title: Dead Reckoning Part Two
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 112,783Chapters: 7/12Kudos: 8

Summary: Aven is living on borrowed time, his body harboring something intelligent, dangerous, and very much awake. As powerful corporations circle and a desperate mission pushes him deep into enemy territory, survival demands disguises, secrets, and impossible trust. Love offers brief sanctuary, even as it makes everything more fragile. Hunted, exposed, and running out of room to run, Aven must face the truth:staying alive may cost more than dying ever would...

entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 88,999Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 51

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. entry.title: EFFORTS TO REVERSE THE FLOODING OF GOTHAM / Myotis septentrionalis; behaviors and observations
entry.summary:
Author: Save_Feza

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,942Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 4

Summary: In the aftermath of Lex Luthor’s attacks, Clark has been attempting to find the good in all the distress. Luckily, down the road in Gotham, the restoration efforts after similar disasters may inspire the people of Metropolis to look to the skies with hope and ambition again. The hard part is that his source, one Bruce Wayne, isn’t the sociable type. Good thing Superman has the means to befriend Gotham's protector, Batman!Bruce Wayne is struggling to find his place in the reconstruction of Gotham. It doesn't help that in the confusing swirl of spearheading a new construction company, stopping a new rampant drug plaguing the streets, and potentially adopting a child, an overly friendly reporter will not leave him alone. Not to mention the sudden appearance of Superman.–This probably sucks but at least I'm not using ai :)Shoutout to my friends who gave me the go ahead to start publishing! UPDATES WILL BE SLOW I AM STARTING YEAR 3 OF COLLEGE

entry.title: Love Me For Forever
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,430Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 5

Summary: Bruce Wayne died destroying a Xenomorph Queen. Clark Kent mourned him with Kryptonian ritual and carried the key to the Batcave against his sternum for nine days. Then Jason Todd brought Bruce back. Resurrection via Lazarus Pit is never clean. Bruce returns with his memories intact and a rage that displaces every other emotion. The two-meter distance that kept Clark alive in the hive becomes the boundary that keeps Bruce from violence. The team fractures over the ethics of resurrection without consent. And in the Pacific Northwest, something new is hunting—parasitic neural infiltrators that enter through the ear canal and leave their hosts conscious during control. Bruce volunteers as bait. Clark shadows him every meter. The key stays cold against Clark's chest. And somewhere in the Cascade Range, a Yautja marks Batman as worthy prey. "You were wrong to do it. But I'm glad you did." Love that persists despite impossibility. Love that consumes despite resistance. Love that exists in darkness and is overcome by forces larger than itself. This is what remains.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Unwritten
entry.summary:
Author: rosered27

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,597Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 13

Summary: There was no family who could take him, he was thrown into a juvenile detention center, and then escaped with some other kids. He missed school for a long time, ran the streets, gathered up a criminal record just to try to find his parents. He’d been knocked down and beaten up, starved for a long time, hurt because he wanted his mom and dad back- And now, he thought, sitting in the hospital room, holding his mom’s hand-thin and bony and nothing like it had been before-he wondered, Maybe it would’ve been better if they had died back then? Or; Duke is living with Bruce Wayne. His dad is brain dead and his mom has Huntington's disease. Still, he's hopeful that one day soon, everything will go back to normal. Duke tries to make the most of it, and tries to live like his parents would want him to. Though his new life poses a problem because, why does his eyes hurt all of the time now.... .......and who's that mysterious boy he keeps seeing?

entry.title: The Cost of Hope
entry.summary:
Author: Barefoot_mouse

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,860Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 46

Summary: “Mister…Batman?” the journalist cut in, stepping forward. From the corner of his eye, Bruce saw him tilt his head slightly, as if listening to something silent and distant. The nervousness drained from his face, replaced by a faint look of relief. “I’m sure if we just wait for the police—” “Where are you from?” Bruce interrupted again, squaring his shoulders, narrowing his eyes at the journalist. The man blinked in confusion. “I’m sorry?” he asked, tilting his head. But when Bruce kept staring, unmoving and silent, the journalist cleared his throat and rubbed the back of his neck again. “I’m from Metropolis, but I—” “You don’t belong here. Get out.” Or A story of identity crisis, violence, love, and hope.

entry.title: Superbat
entry.summary:
Author: guacwardd3

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,882Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: Bruce is invited to a gala in Metropolis by Luthor and ends up meeting Clark Kent, a clumsy reporter from the Daily Planet. But what happens when Bruce thinks Clark has figured out his secret identity when Clark gets too nosy? Neither of them knows each other's true identity but can't help but feel a pull to one another. Clark wants to know why Bruce puts on a facade and Bruce wants to know how much Clark knows.

entry.title: This was not part of the VIP package
entry.summary:
Author: ThatStupidTheAlien

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,983Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 24

Summary: Bruce Wayne just wanted to be a good dad (and never be called an old man). What he didn't expect was to spend over $100,000 on a WWE VIP experience, survive a weekend in Vegas with three overly excited kids… and end up being the landing zone for his kids' favorite wrestler. Superman, the King of the Air, is used to calculating every jump with precision—until he misses and ends up falling right on top of Bruce Wayne. Between the lights, the matches, the autograph signings (and a Jason Todd on the verge of a breakdown after meeting Rhea Ripley), Bruce begins to discover that perhaps the most unexpected thing about the whole trip wasn't the fall… but the person who landed on him, which was definitely not part of the itinerary, much less the VIP package.

entry.title: the whole world was here, waiting
entry.summary:
Author: Neery

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,236Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 451

Summary: In another universe, a much darker version of Batman has been holding Superman captive for a year. In this one, Bruce was only planning to neutralize an interdimensional threat. He didn’t plan on a rescue mission. He didn’t plan to take home a hurt, broken captive who may or may not be a version of the Clark Kent he knows. But now that he has, he needs to figure out what to do with him without putting the whole planet at risk. It takes Clark a while to realize he hasn’t just traded one abuser for another, more dangerous one.

entry.title: The Moon and his Sun
entry.summary:
Author: Gotham_Blight

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,229Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 70

Summary: As the only heir to the kingdom of Gotham, Bruce Wayne is bound by duty to marry someone that he doesn't love: the daughter of the Demon's head, Talia al Ghul. He knows, more than anything, that he is expected to do this for the good of his people. Despite this, he can’t keep his desire for his knight, Clark, hidden. When all he wants to do is be pinned underneath Clark 24/7, how is he meant to fulfill his duty to his people?

entry.title: Everybody knows
entry.summary:
Author: LukeWinssmett

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,387Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 317

Summary: The room looks like a cell. Too clean. Too white. A simulation of comfort. Yet, enclosed in a kind of glass box, too big to hold a bed and a few basic things: it's a complete room with a metal door. And in the centre, sitting in a simple chair, is a man.At first, Conner thinks he is an employee. A technician. Someone who angered his father enough to end up locked up. Then the man raises his head. His eyes — blue, intense — open with a mixture of surprise and something more dangerous. Recognition. "Kon-El"
